TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ndriçim_Xhepa, title = Ndriçim_Xhepa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ndriçim_Xhepa} }

S.FORM: Ndriçim Xhepa kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 1, Ndriçim Xhepa, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Ndriçim Xhepa kawas tay 1957, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 1, Ndriçim Xhepa, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: n*ri*im xħepa kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, n*ri*im xħepa, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
